title: Xbox Brings Original Games to PC According to Recent Reports
description: Microsoft is expanding backward compatibility to PC, allowing players to enjoy original Xbox titles on their computers, according to multiple sources.

sources.title: Play More of the Games You Love, Wherever You Play with XBOX Backward Compatibility on PC
Microsoft is bringing original Xbox games to PC
Xbox Brings OG Console Games to PC, and There’s a Good Reason Why

sections.heading: Xbox Backward Compatibility Expansion
paragraphs: According to XBOX Wire, users can play more of the games they love wherever they play with Xbox backward compatibility on PC.
The Verge reports that Microsoft is bringing original Xbox games to PC.

sections.heading: Industry Analysis
paragraphs: Gizmodo states that Xbox is bringing OG console games to PC and indicates that there is a good reason why.

sections.heading: Search Trend Context
paragraphs: The term 'game' is currently trending in the GB region.
Google Trends provides data on the popularity of search terms, with a reported search lower bound of 500 for this topic.

faq.a: Gizmodo reports that Xbox brings OG console games to PC and notes that there is a good reason why.
